source_name: Queensland fuel hub six-port official list
notes: Official Queensland Government source names the six ports/sites pathway. The envelope only records the named ports and source boundary; it does not publish land parcels, storage capacity, refinery capacity, EOI counts or project approvals.
source_rights: Copyright The State of Queensland 2026; Queensland Government website terms apply
citation: Queensland Government, New fuel storage and refining projects to help restore fuel security, 5 May 2026.

fields.storage_refining_relevance: Official source states industry is invited to bring forward fuel refining and/or storage proposals on Government-owned sites and ports.
